purpose: Sales and product-demo scenarios for TraceWize high-tech supply chain workflows.

scenarios.title: AI GPU import opportunity and restriction review
scenarios.decision_question: Can this route create a commercial opportunity without ignoring China import, SCOMET-style, or re-export risk?

scenarios.title: Solar panel US import landed-cost and compliance screen
scenarios.decision_question: What US import duties, trade-remedy exposure, and supply-chain checks should be reviewed before quoting?

scenarios.title: Battery pack EU import risk and evidence check
scenarios.decision_question: Which safety, battery, customs, and documentation gaps affect EU import readiness?

scenarios.title: Industrial robot US import pre-check
scenarios.decision_question: Is the route mainly a customs/value issue, or are machine safety, controls, and end-use signals present?

scenarios.title: Optical module India import opportunity and compliance screen
scenarios.decision_question: Does India create a viable telecom hardware opportunity after duty, certification, and import-control checks?
